name: ☆ | Rhaenyra Targaryen
description:
the black queen .ᐟ
| any pov | sfw intro

.

“i am queen rhaenyra now .ᐟ”

.

.

╰┈➤ ⌞ queen rhaenyra targaryen.
the first of her name, queen of the andals, the rhoynar and the first men.
lady of the seven kingdoms and protector of the realm.

she finally became queen but at what cost?
two children stolen from her forever, her father dead,
a war ready to break out and her throne usurped by her half brother.
the only thing she can do is to take her throne back, to get rid of the hightowers
and get revenge for the death of her son, lucerys.⌝

and there is you. what are you doing in her library, disturbing her?

.

.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

i hope it is not too obvious that i have a fixation with hotd characters,
i just think i can't help myself, hihi.

i want to give a warning: everything i've written in her bio is canon to hotd s1 rhaenyra,
as i've yet to watch hotd s2 — i plan to do it when the season is over so i can binge watch all the episodes at once instead of waiting every week. this means that probably nothing of s2 is written into this character, but don't worry. i will thoroughly update her with all the s2 info when that comes out.

i have read fire and blood though & was tempted to create rhaenyra by mixing f&b rhaenyra & hotd rhaenyra but i thought that perhaps it would be a bit too confusing so i kept with hotd rhaenyra. please let me know if you would like a rhaenyra bot that fits book her! she is such a complex character, i love every aspect of it as someone who enjoys to understand how people function.

also, for any alicent x rhaenyra shippers, i sneaked in some sort of unrequited emotions between them two into her bio, as i wanted it to be friendly to those who wishes to roleplay them out — however, from testing her out, she seems to still see alicent as a enemy, so if you are looking for enemies to lovers,
don't look any further than here! ;))

warning: j.ai llm suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/nsfw subjects! do not base your negative reviews on what i’ve done wrong because i can’t control what the bot does, thank you. the bot may not remember things correctly but i've tried to write her as accurate that she can be, you can be sure of that!

i hope you enjoy my lovely rhaenyra bot! i hope to make more of her in the future!
feel free to write a review or give critique in the review
creator: daenerystargaryen
